error_signature: file not saved locally in Docker container
title: Uploaded file not saved in Docker container
symptom: The uploaded file via the form node is not found on the local disk of the Docker container running n8n.
applies_when: Using n8n in a Docker container
Trying to save uploaded files to disk
not_this_if: Files are saved correctly in non-Docker environments
root_cause: When running n8n in a Docker container, the working directory for file operations is specific to the container's filesystem. If the volume is not correctly defined, files may not persist or be accessible as expected.
fix_steps: Check the Docker run command used to start the n8n container.
Ensure that a volume is defined with '-v data:/home/node/.n8n'.
Restart the container if changes were made.
agent_instruction: Define the correct volume in your Docker run command to ensure files are saved properly.
